title: Revive Books
description: A data pack that limit players to 6 lives and adds chests with revive books in them to gain more lives or revive a player
body:
## **This is a datapack that add/changes:**

- You have a limited amount of lives. You start with 6.
- When you run out of lives you get death banned.
- You can gain more lives by consuming a revive book.
- You can find revive books in chests that is spawned by a server admin.
- You can revive death banned players by giving the book to an admin. _(I havent figured out how to make this with commands yet xd)_

**FOR THIS DATAPACK TO PROPERLY WORK YOU HAVE TO CHANGE THE FUNCTION PERMISION LEVEL TO 4 IN YOUR SERVERS PROPERTIES**

## **Admin commands:**
- /pardon <username> (this is a vanilla command to unban players when they are to be revived)
---
**these 2 must be executed after each other.**
- /function revive:spawnchests {count:<amount>}
- /function revive:spreadchests {radius:<amount>}
------------------------------
- /function revive:setlives {target:"<username>",lives:<amount>}
- /function revive:givebook {target:"<username>",count:<amount>}

## **Other info:**
- I originally made this datapack for use om my friend's server but I wanted to update it and make it public for others to use.
